# Video parity fixtures: kids.mp4

Generated by `tools/gen_video_parity_fixtures.py` against the Python
reference at `reference/sam3/sam3/`.

## Files

- `prompts.json` — prompt specification: 2 objects, point prompts on
  frame 0.
- `frames/frame_NNNN_obj_M.png` — Python-generated mask PNGs (uint8,
  one per (frame, object)) for frames 0..29.

## Regenerating

    cd tools/
    SAM3_CKPT=/path/to/sam3.pth SAM3_BPE=/path/to/bpe \
      python gen_video_parity_fixtures.py \
      --video ../assets/kids.mp4 \
      --out ../tests/fixtures/video_kids/

Requires Python 3.10+, PyTorch, and the reference repo at
`reference/sam3/`. The generator is NOT run in CI; fixtures are
checked in as binary blobs when the reference behavior is blessed.

## Gating

The C parity test (`tests/test_video_parity_kids.c`) is built only
when `cmake -DSAM3_BUILD_PARITY_TESTS=ON`. Without that flag, the
test source is excluded from the build.
